tasks.subject: T0: Create tools/start-crawler-daemon.sh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the executable interactive launcher managing 4 daemon variants via screen.

**Files:**
- tools/start-crawler-daemon.sh (create + chmod +x)

**Verify:** `bash -n tools/start-crawler-daemon.sh && test -x tools/start-crawler-daemon.sh && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/start-crawler-daemon.sh"],"verifyCommand":"bash -n tools/start-crawler-daemon.sh && test -x tools/start-crawler-daemon.sh && echo OK","acceptanceCriteria":["File exists with +x mode","bash -n syntax check passes","DAEMONS array has 4 entries","Helpers is_running/get_pid/stop_daemon/start_daemon defined","Main loop iterates DAEMONS","set -e at top","git ls-files --stage shows 100755 mode"]}
```
